title: Λcos: Code and Data for "Apparent Phantom Crossing as Template Bias: A Bounded-Clock Deformation of ΛCDM"
description: Analysis pipeline, MCMC chains, figure-generation scripts, and LaTeX source for the paper "Apparent Phantom Crossing as Template Bias: A Bounded-Clock Deformation of ΛCDM" (B. Shatto, 2026). The Λcos model is a one-parameter bounded-clock deformation of the fiducial flat ΛCDM expansion history. This archive reproduces the joint Pantheon+ and DESI DR2 BAO fits for ΛCDM, Λcos, and wCDM; the template-bias mock fits across CPL, BA, JBP, and a three-parameter polynomial; the CPL threshold scan; the prior- and Ω_Λ-sensitivity scans; the CMB distance-prior fits; the clock-exponent comparison; and the DESI DR1 linear-growth consistency check.

creators.name: Shatto, B.
creators.affiliation: Independent Researcher, St. Petersburg, FL, USA
